mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE comment_tree AS ( SELECT id, parent_comment_id, depth, body, commenter_id, is_deleted, created_at, ARRAY[id] AS path FROM comment WHERE content_id = #{postId} AND parent_comment_id IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT c.id, c.parent_comment_id, c.depth, c.body, c.commenter_id, c.is_deleted, c.created_at, ct.path || c.id FROM comment c JOIN comment_tree ct ON c.parent_comment_id = ct.id ) SELECT ct.id, ct.parent_comment_id, ct.depth, CASE WHEN ct.is_deleted THEN NULL ELSE ct.body END AS body, CASE WHEN ct.is_deleted THEN NULL WHEN co.type = 'user' THEN u.username ELSE g.name END AS author_name, co.type AS author_type, ct.is_deleted AS deleted, ct.created_at FROM comment_tree ct JOIN commenter co ON ct.commenter_id = co.id LEFT JOIN users u ON co.type = 'user' AND u.commenter_id = co.id LEFT JOIN guest g ON co.type = 'guest' AND g.commenter_id = co.id ORDER BY ct.path

SELECT c.id, c.commenter_id, co.type AS commenter_type, g.password_hash AS guest_password_hash, c.is_deleted AS deleted FROM comment c JOIN commenter co ON c.commenter_id = co.id LEFT JOIN guest g ON co.type = 'guest' AND g.commenter_id = co.id WHERE c.id = #{commentId}
SELECT commenter_id FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}
SELECT id, depth FROM comment WHERE id = #{parentCommentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO guest (commenter_id, name, password_hash) VALUES (#{commenterId}, #{name}, #{passwordHash})
INSERT INTO comment (content_id, commenter_id, parent_comment_id, depth, body) VALUES (#{postId}, #{commenterId}, #{req.parentCommentId}, #{depth}, #{req.body})
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET is_deleted = TRUE, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{commentId}
